title: Indulgent Greek Rice Fritters
description: These airy, crispy fritters fuse Greek flavors with a touch of sweetness, all in an egg‑free, loukoumades‑style shape. Sweet honey drizzle and crispy scallop‑shaped shells make for a decadent snack or dessert.
instructions: Combine dry ingredients in a bowl: stir fry-grind-rice-khao-khua, wholegrain mustard, cinnamon, and salt.
Pour lukewarm water and maple syrup into the dry mix and stir until the batter thickens and becomes light.
Heat coconut oil in a shallow scallop-shaped pan over medium heat until shimmering.
Using a tablespoon, spoon small rounds into the hot oil, spacing them 2 inches apart.
Fry until edges firm and tops bubble, about 2‑3 minutes per side, then remove and drain on paper towels.
Place fritters back into a scallop shell mold and press gently to form the scallop shape.
Drizzle honey over the warm fritters and sprinkle a light dusting of extra cinnamon.
